title: Add optional debug overlay for shader and geometry state
overview: Enhance the existing debug overlay (src/ui/debugOverlay.ts) to show shader compile status, optional attribute presence, and active mode name. The overlay already exists with FPS/mode/points/bass/treble. This ticket extends it with shader and geometry diagnostic fields from the existing ShaderErrorCollector and health gate infrastructure. No new files needed — extend existing modules.

steps.title: Extend DebugFrameData interface
steps.details: Add three new fields to the DebugFrameData interface: `shaderStatus: 'pass' | 'fail' | 'pending'` (whether shader compilation passed at startup), `optionalAttrs: string[]` (list of optional attribute names currently present on the active geometry, e.g. ['size']), and `qualityTier: string` (the current quality tier: 'low'|'medium'|'high'). These are all non-identifying developer diagnostics.

steps.title: Update overlay render function to display new fields
steps.details:
Extend the `update` function's textContent template to show: (1) shader status as 'shader: pass' or 'shader: FAIL', (2) optional attributes as a comma-separated list or 'none', (3) quality tier. Keep the existing FPS/mode/points/bass/treble lines. Total output should be 3 short lines of preformatted text. Example output:

FPS: 60 | mode: pointcloud | tier: high
points: 1200 | bass: 42 | treble: 18
shader: pass | opt-attrs: size

steps.title: Extend LoopDeps with new debug getters
steps.details: Add optional getter properties to LoopDeps: `getShaderStatus?: (() => 'pass' | 'fail' | 'pending') | null`, `getOptionalAttrs?: (() => string[]) | null`, `getQualityTier?: (() => string) | null`. In the frame callback where onDebugFrame is invoked, populate the new DebugFrameData fields from these getters, defaulting to 'pending', [], and 'unknown' respectively.

steps.title: Wire new debug getters in main.ts
steps.details: After the health gate runs and geometry systems are initialized (inside the geoPromise.then block around line 127-142), wire the new LoopDeps getters: (1) `getShaderStatus` — return 'pending' initially, then after health gate: return errorCollector.hasErrors() ? 'fail' : 'pass'. (2) `getOptionalAttrs` — query the active geometry system's BufferGeometry for the presence of each optional attribute from shaderRegistry (OPTIONAL_POINTCLOUD_ATTRIBUTES etc.), return names of those present. (3) `getQualityTier` — return quality.tier. Keep this wiring inside the existing async block where deps.quality is already set.

steps.title: Verify no visitor identifiers are exposed
steps.details: Audit the final DebugFrameData interface to confirm it contains only: fps (number), modeName (string enum), pointCount (number), bass/treble (number), shaderStatus (enum), optionalAttrs (attribute names), qualityTier (enum). None of these are visitor-identifying. No raw IP, user-agent, geo, seed, or signal values are included.

steps.title: Verify disabled-by-default behavior
steps.details: Confirm the existing gate at line 62 (`new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).has('debug')`) still controls overlay creation. No changes needed here — the overlay DOM element and the onDebugFrame callback are only created when ?debug is present. The new getters in LoopDeps are cheap no-ops when onDebugFrame is null (the existing `d.onDebugFrame?.()` optional chain short-circuits).

steps.title: Build and manual smoke test
steps.details: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors. Then `npm run dev` and verify: (1) Normal load (no ?debug) shows no overlay. (2) Load with ?debug shows the enhanced overlay with all fields. (3) Shader status shows 'pass' after init completes. (4) Optional attrs list updates when mode transitions. (5) No console errors. (6) No forbidden storage APIs used.

risks: The optional attribute check per frame could be slightly expensive if done naively — use the getter pattern to only compute when debug is active (already handled by the onDebugFrame optional chain).
Mode transitions change the active geometry — getOptionalAttrs must query the current active system, not a stale reference.
testing_strategy: Build gate (npm run build), manual verification with ?debug query param, confirm overlay absent without query param. Verify no visitor data leaks by auditing DebugFrameData fields.
